offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 timesheets/month, inefficient payroll processing causes late payments. We compile timesheets and prepare payroll input files instead of manual timesheet compilation and payroll input preparation.
problem: Inefficient payroll processing leading to delays in payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Participate in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual timesheet entry and payroll input file generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
